tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse] 

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Picture perfect memories,[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
 Scattered all around the floor.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                              
Reaching for the phone cause,[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
 I can’t fight it any more.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]Am[/ch]
And I wonder if I ever cross your mind.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
For me it happens all the time.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                             [ch]Em[/ch]
It’s a quarter after one, I’m all alone and I need you now.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Said I wouldn’t come but I lost all control and I need you now. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                             [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
And I don’t know how I can do without, I just need you now.[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Another shot of whiskey, can’t stop looking at the door.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                [ch]Em[/ch]
Wishing you’d come sweeping in the way you did before.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]Am[/ch]
And I wonder if I ever cross your mind.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
For me it happens all the time.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                
It’s a quarter after one, I’m a little drunk,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
And I need you now.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Said I wouldn’t call but I lost all control and I need you now. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                             [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
And I don’t know how I can do without, I just need you now[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Yes I’d rather hurt than feel nothing at all.[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                             [ch]Em[/ch]
It’s a quarter after one, I’m all alone and I need you now.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                       [ch]Em[/ch]
And I said I wouldn’t call but I’m a little drunk and I need you now.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                             [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
And I don’t know how I can do without, I just need you now.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I just need you now.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Oh baby I need you now.[/tab]
